faqs.q: How much does Resmed Airmini Travel CPAP Machine cost in India?
faqs.a: The cost of Resmed Airmini Travel CPAP is Rs 57,899 on Oxygen Times which is the lowest online price in India.

faqs.q: Can you use ResMed AirMini daily?
faqs.a: Although Resmed Airmini can offer the same effective compressed air as a full-sized CPAP, the AirMini is made to be used as a travel CPAP.

faqs.q: What is the warranty of Resmed Airmini Travel CPAP Machine?
faqs.a: The warranty of Resmed Airmini travel CPAP is of 3 years.

faqs.q: Does Resmed Airmini travel CPAP have a battery?
faqs.a: No. Airmini does not have a battery, it needs to be plugged into power source to operate. One can purchase the battery separately.

faqs.q: Which CPAP masks are compatible with Resmed AirMini travel CPAP?
faqs.a: Resmed Airmini is compatible with AirFit N30 for AirMini, AirFit P10 for AirMini, AirFit F30, AirTouch™ F20, AirFit N20, AirFit F20 and AirTouch N20 mask.

faqs.q: Where can I buy Resmed Airmini Travel CPAP Machine in India?
faqs.a: You can buy Resmed Airmini from Oxygen Times with 3 years warranty. On average, it takes approximately 24-48 hours to deliver the product PAN India.

faqs.q: Does Resmed AirMini travel CPAP use water?
faqs.a: No. Resmed Airmini uses waterless humidification technology via HumidX and HumidX plus which are compatible with nasal pillow and nasal masks.

description_text:
Resmed Airmini Travel CPAP Machine

Resmed Airmini is a travel CPAP machine and is the World's smallest portable CPAP in the market that can fit in the palm of the hands. It weighs only 300 grams and has waterless humidification technology. Resmed Airmini has the following features- 


	
	Therapy modes

	CPAP, AutoSet (APAP) and AutoSet for Her (fAPAP) are the therapy modes available in Resmed Airmini travel CPAP machine.
	



	
	 Waterless Humidification 

	The HumidX is a little disc that fits into the short tube of AirMini travel CPAP, unlike a regular humidifier which needs distilled water. Utilizing innovative technology, HumidX adds humidity to the therapeutic air by reusing moisture from the patient's breath. 
	



	
	Expiratory Pressure Relief 

	Resmed Airmini comes with EPR that helps you to breathe out without straining against the air pressure. when you it drops the entering pressure 
	



	
	Airmini app 

	To make modifications in Resmed Airmini, you just need to open the clinical menu in the AirMini app and select therapy mode, EPR, Pressure or Ramp. A variety of comfort settings via the AirMini app can be controlled. Users may view their sleep data from the previous 30 days as well as their score each morning
	
	
	Bluetooth Conectivity 
	


You can connect the Resmed Airmini travel CPAP to Airmini app via bluetooth connectivity available 


	
	Warranty 
	


Airmini has 2 years warranty.


	
	What's in the Box?
	
	
	Resmed Airmini travel CPAP Machine
	
	
	Power supply cord
	
	
	Drawstring bag
	
	
	Filter
	
	
	User Manual 
	


What's in the Set Up Kit? 


	
	P10 kit with mask
	


(P10 mask, connector, humidx , humidx plus and tube)


	
	F20 mask with tube
	


(F20 mask, connector and tube)

Note: F20 mask is not compatible with Humidx
